title: DotShare Analytics & Smart Hashtags
description: Introducing the Analytics Dashboard and Smart Hashtags.

handlers.name: AIHandler.ts
handlers.purpose: Enhance prompt engineering for Smart Hashtags

analytics_dashboard: Design and implement visual charts (Chart.js/D3) in webview.
Aggregate post success rates, view counts (where API allows), and platform usage.
smart_ai_hashtags: Modify AI generation prompts to request context-aware hashtags.
Extract language/framework from active editor context.
Append trending/relevant hashtags dynamically based on content.

api_resilience: Implement exponential backoff specifically for HTTP 429 (Rate Limit) errors.
Add rate limit status tracking per platform to prevent unnecessary API calls.
memory_optimization: Stream large media files during upload instead of loading entirely into memory.
Implement garbage collection triggers after large video/GIF uploads.
oauth_handling: Add automatic prompt for re-authentication before attempting to post.

phase_1_core_updates: Update AI Prompts for Smart Hashtags.
Implement HTTP 429 Retry Logic across existing Handlers.
Fix Markdown rendering issues for Telegram/Discord.

feature_completion: Working Analytics Dashboard with accurate data.
performance: Zero crashes during API rate limit scenarios.
